---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[Bug]: '
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]

---

> **Note:** The Python Attestation SDK, Local GPU Verifier, and PPCIE Verifier 1.x are deprecated.
> Please use the [C++ SDK and CLI](https://github.com/NVIDIA/attestation-sdk) instead.
> If your issue relates to deprecated components, we may not be able to address it.

**Component**
Which component does this affect? [e.g. PPCIE Verifier 2.x, Host Tools, PPCIE Verifier 1.x (deprecated), Python SDK (deprecated), Local GPU Verifier (deprecated)]

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Detailed steps to reproduce the issue.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Environment (please provide the following information):**
 - `nvtrust` package version: [e.g. `v1.3.0`]
 - Python version: [e.g. `3.10.12`]
 - NVIDIA Driver Version: [e.g. 550.54.15]
 - Host OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
 - Kernel Version: [e.g. 5.15.0-generic]
 - CPU Architecture: [e.g. `x86_64`, `aarch64`]
 - GPU Model(s): [e.g. H100, B200, GB200]
 - GPU Firmware Version: [e.g. 97.00.5a.00.02]
 - Deployment: [e.g. Bare-metal, Docker, Kubernetes]

If applicable, also provide:
 - Container Runtime Version: [e.g. containerd 1.7.0]
 - Kubernetes Distro and Version: [e.g. K8s 1.29, OpenShift 4.14]
 - NVIDIA GPU Operator version

**Relevant log output**
Please paste relevant error and log output here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
